ABYSSAL_BATHS.title: The Abyssal Baths
ABYSSAL_BATHS.description: A hot spring bubbles up from the dungeon depths. The water glows an unnatural blue. Other crawlers are already soaking. The dungeon AI cheerfully announces spa day.
AMALGAMATOR.title: The Amalgamator
AMALGAMATOR.description: A dungeon machine that fuses items together. The results are... unpredictable. Previous crawlers' fused remains decorate the walls.
AROMA_OF_CHAOS.title: The Aroma of Chaos
AROMA_OF_CHAOS.description: A strange scent wafts through the corridor. The dungeon AI warns that breathing deeply may cause 'exciting side effects.' The audience ratings spike.
BATTLEWORN_DUMMY.title: The Training Dummy
BATTLEWORN_DUMMY.description: A battered practice dummy stands in the center of the room. It looks like it's been punched by every crawler who ever lived.
BRAIN_LEECH.title: The Mind Leech (Floor 4)
BRAIN_LEECH.description: A parasitic creature attaches to your head. The dungeon AI assures you this is 'perfectly normal floor fauna.' The audience votes on whether you should remove it.
BUGSLAYER.title: The Bugslayer's Den
BUGSLAYER.description: A retired crawler-turned-exterminator offers their services. They specialize in dungeon pest removal.
BYRDONIS_NEST.title: Byrdonis Nesting Ground
BYRDONIS_NEST.description: A massive nest of the avian guardian. Eggs shimmer with power. Touch one, and the broadcast cameras zoom in.
COLORFUL_PHILOSOPHERS.title: The Colorful Philosophers
COLORFUL_PHILOSOPHERS.description: Three brightly dressed dungeon NPCs debate the meaning of crawling. They offer wisdom in exchange for gold.
COLOSSAL_FLOWER.title: The Colossal Bloom
COLOSSAL_FLOWER.description: An enormous flower has grown through the dungeon floor. Its petals pulse with healing energy... or is that pollen?
CRYSTAL_SPHERE.title: Mysterious Loot Sphere
CRYSTAL_SPHERE.description: A floating crystal orb hovers in the chamber. The dungeon AI announces it as a 'premium loot opportunity.' The audience cheers.
DENSE_VEGETATION.title: Overgrown Corridor
DENSE_VEGETATION.description: The dungeon corridor is choked with mutant vegetation. Something moves in the undergrowth.
DOLL_ROOM.title: The Doll Room
DOLL_ROOM.description: A room filled with porcelain dolls. Princess Donut would love this. Actually, Princess Donut would hate this. The dolls' eyes follow you.
DOORS_OF_LIGHT_AND_DARK.title: Doors of Light and Shadow
DOORS_OF_LIGHT_AND_DARK.description: Two doors stand before you. One radiates warm light, the other swirls with darkness. The dungeon AI says both lead to 'exciting content.'
DROWNING_BEACON.title: The Drowning Beacon
DROWNING_BEACON.description: A lighthouse stands in a flooded section of the dungeon. Its light reveals hidden paths... and hidden dangers.
ENDLESS_CONVEYOR.title: The Endless Conveyor
ENDLESS_CONVEYOR.description: A massive conveyor belt runs through the dungeon. Items from previous crawlers tumble past. Grab what you can.
FAKE_MERCHANT.title: Fake Vendor (It's a Mimic)
FAKE_MERCHANT.description: A friendly-looking merchant waves you over. The prices seem too good to be true. Because they are. It's a mimic. The audience knew the whole time.
FIELD_OF_MAN_SIZED_HOLES.title: Field of Crawler-Sized Holes
FIELD_OF_MAN_SIZED_HOLES.description: The ground is dotted with person-shaped holes. Each one seems custom-made for a different crawler. One of them looks exactly like you.
GRAVE_OF_THE_FORGOTTEN.title: Grave of the Forgotten Crawlers
GRAVE_OF_THE_FORGOTTEN.description: A graveyard of crawlers who didn't make it. Their tombstones display their final viewer ratings.
HUNGRY_FOR_MUSHROOMS.title: Mushroom Harvest
HUNGRY_FOR_MUSHROOMS.description: A field of glowing mushrooms. Some are edible, some are explosive, and some grant temporary powers. Choose wisely.
INFESTED_AUTOMATON.title: The Infested Automaton
INFESTED_AUTOMATON.description: A deactivated dungeon robot, crawling with parasites. It might have useful parts inside... if you can deal with the infestation.
JUNGLE_MAZE_ADVENTURE.title: The Jungle Maze
JUNGLE_MAZE_ADVENTURE.description: A section of the dungeon has been overgrown into a maze. The dungeon AI narrates your progress like a nature documentary.
LOST_WISP.title: The Lost Will-o'-Wisp
LOST_WISP.description: A floating light drifts through the corridor, beckoning you to follow. The audience chat is split on whether it's a trap.
LUMINOUS_CHOIR.title: The Luminous Choir
LUMINOUS_CHOIR.description: Glowing entities sing in harmony. Their song heals... or harms, depending on the melody you choose.
MORPHIC_GROVE.title: The Morphic Grove
MORPHIC_GROVE.description: A grove of shape-shifting trees. Each one takes the form of something you desire. The dungeon AI warns about 'false promises.'
NEOW.title: The Starting Blessing
NEOW.description: A mysterious entity offers you a choice at the start of your run. Choose wisely, crawler.
POTION_COURIER.title: Skull Juice Delivery
POTION_COURIER.description: A courier dashes through the corridor carrying crates of Skull Juice. They'll sell you some at a discount. The bottles have the Primus seal.
PUNCH_OFF.title: The Punch-Off
PUNCH_OFF.description: A dungeon-sponsored punching tournament. The audience goes wild. Entry fee required. Prize: bragging rights and loot.
RANWID_THE_ELDER.title: Mordecai's Advice
RANWID_THE_ELDER.description: An ancient spirit offers cryptic guidance. It speaks in riddles about the floors ahead. The dungeon AI seems annoyed by its presence.
REFLECTIONS.title: The Mirror Room
REFLECTIONS.description: A room full of mirrors. Your reflections move independently. One of them has better loot than you.
RELIC_TRADER.title: The Relic Fence
RELIC_TRADER.description: A shady dealer operates out of a hidden alcove. They trade in artifacts from previous seasons. Everything falls off the back of a dungeon cart.
ROOM_FULL_OF_CHEESE.title: Room Full of Crawler Biscuits
ROOM_FULL_OF_CHEESE.description: The room is filled floor-to-ceiling with Crawler Biscuits. The smell is... distinctive. The dungeon AI says they're 'perfectly nutritious.' The audience doesn't believe it.
ROUND_TEA_PARTY.title: The Tea Party
ROUND_TEA_PARTY.description: Dungeon creatures sit around a table, drinking tea. They invite you to join. It seems oddly civilized for a death dungeon.
SAPPHIRE_SEED.title: The Sapphire Seed
SAPPHIRE_SEED.description: A glowing blue seed pulses with energy. Plant it, eat it, or sell it. Each choice has consequences the dungeon AI won't explain.
SELF_HELP_BOOK.title: Self-Help Scroll
SELF_HELP_BOOK.description: A motivational scroll left by a previous crawler. Chapter titles include 'How to Survive Floor 3' and 'Believing in Yourself Won't Stop the Monsters.'
SLIPPERY_BRIDGE.title: Slippery Stairwell
SLIPPERY_BRIDGE.description: The stairwell between floors is coated in something slick. The dungeon AI helpfully suggests 'not falling.' The audience bets on whether you will.
SPIRALING_WHIRLPOOL.title: The Spiraling Whirlpool
SPIRALING_WHIRLPOOL.description: A whirlpool has formed in the dungeon's waterways. Items and creatures swirl around it. Jump in?
SPIRIT_GRAFTER.title: The Spirit Grafter
SPIRIT_GRAFTER.description: A dungeon surgeon offers to graft spiritual energy onto your equipment. The procedure is... invasive.
STONE_OF_ALL_TIME.title: The Stone of All Floors
STONE_OF_ALL_TIME.description: An ancient monolith records the history of every floor. Touch it to see visions of what lies ahead... and what came before.
SUNKEN_STATUE.title: The Sunken Statue
SUNKEN_STATUE.description: A half-submerged statue of a previous season's champion. Its outstretched hand holds something.
SUNKEN_TREASURY.title: The Sunken Treasury
SUNKEN_TREASURY.description: A flooded vault from a previous dungeon season. Gold and relics shimmer beneath the water. But what else lurks down there?
SYMBIOTE.title: The Dungeon Parasite
SYMBIOTE.description: A living organism attaches to your arm. It whispers promises of power. The dungeon AI logs it as 'voluntary biological modification.' The audience votes on names for it.
TABLET_OF_TRUTH.title: The Tablet of Truth
TABLET_OF_TRUTH.description: A stone tablet inscribed with dungeon secrets. Reading it reveals hidden mechanics... but the knowledge comes at a cost.
TEA_MASTER.title: The Tea Master
TEA_MASTER.description: A serene NPC offers you a cup of dungeon tea. Each blend has different effects. The ceremony is broadcast live to millions.
THE_ARCHITECT.title: The Architect's Workshop
THE_ARCHITECT.description: The chief designer of this dungeon floor invites you in. They want feedback on their latest death trap designs.
THE_FUTURE_OF_POTIONS.title: Skull Juice Lab
THE_FUTURE_OF_POTIONS.description: A high-tech laboratory where new Skull Juice formulas are being tested. Volunteer as a test subject? The compensation package includes 'probably not dying.'
THE_LANTERN_KEY.title: The Lantern Key
THE_LANTERN_KEY.description: A glowing lantern illuminates a hidden keyhole in the wall. Insert the key, and a new path opens. But every new path in the dungeon leads to danger.
THE_LEGENDS_WERE_TRUE.title: The Tutorial Was Right
THE_LEGENDS_WERE_TRUE.description: Everything the tutorial said about this floor turns out to be accurate. The dungeon AI seems disappointed you were paying attention.
THIS_OR_THAT.title: Loot Box: This or That
THIS_OR_THAT.description: The dungeon presents two loot boxes. One is gold, one is silver. The audience already knows what's inside. You don't.
TINKER_TIME.title: Tinker's Workshop
TINKER_TIME.description: A dungeon mechanic offers to modify your equipment. Their work area is littered with parts from previous crawlers' gear.
TRASH_HEAP.title: The Trash Heap
TRASH_HEAP.description: A massive pile of discarded items from previous dungeon seasons. One crawler's trash is another crawler's treasure.
TRIAL.title: The Dungeon Trial
TRIAL.description: The dungeon AI puts you on trial for 'crimes against entertainment.' The jury is the audience. The sentence is always combat.
UNREST_SITE.title: The Unrest Site
UNREST_SITE.description: A campfire that looks inviting but feels wrong. The flames are cold. Previous crawlers left warnings carved into the walls.
WAR_HISTORIAN_REPY.title: War Historian
WAR_HISTORIAN_REPY.description: A scholarly NPC catalogues the battles of previous dungeon seasons. They offer combat knowledge in exchange for your own battle stories.
WATERLOGGED_SCRIPTORIUM.title: The Waterlogged Archive
WATERLOGGED_SCRIPTORIUM.description: A flooded library of dungeon lore. Most of the scrolls are ruined, but a few remain readable.
WELCOME_TO_WONGOS.title: Welcome to the Primus Gift Shop
WELCOME_TO_WONGOS.description: A garish gift shop operated by the Primus. Overpriced souvenirs, dubious merchandise, and a suspiciously enthusiastic shopkeeper. The audience gets discount codes.
WELLSPRING.title: The Dungeon Wellspring
WELLSPRING.description: A natural spring of healing water bubbles up from the dungeon floor. The water tastes like copper and regret.
WHISPERING_HOLLOW.title: The Whispering Hollow
WHISPERING_HOLLOW.description: The walls whisper secrets from previous crawlers. Some tips are useful. Some are lies. The dungeon AI won't tell you which.
WOOD_CARVINGS.title: The Wood Carvings
WOOD_CARVINGS.description: Intricate wooden carvings line the walls, depicting scenes from previous dungeon seasons. One of them moves.
ZEN_WEAVER.title: The Zen Weaver
ZEN_WEAVER.description: A spider-like NPC weaves patterns of fate. They offer to reweave your destiny... for a price.
